sections.style: min-h-[90vh] flex flex-col justify-center items-center text-center px-4 bg-background_main
sections.content: Devanagari 'अर्थम्' and English Wordmark 'Artham'. Tagline: 'Where Science meets soulful Care'. Primary CTAs: Book Consultation & Call Now.
sections.motion: Slow fade in, subtle upward translation. Staggered reveal for text.

sections.style: py-24 md:py-32 px-6 md:px-12 lg:px-24 bg-background_main text-text_dark
sections.content: Text-focused, editorial layout. Explaining 'Artha' (purpose, worth). Quiet room feel.
sections.motion: Scroll-triggered fade-in. Text lines translate up.

sections.style: py-24 md:py-32 px-6 md:px-12 lg:px-24 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-12 bg-background_dark text-text_light
sections.content: Holistic integration of orthopedics and aesthetics. 'Body as a living narrative'. Not fixing flaws but restoring natural alignment. Includes one serene image.
A singular aesthetic image (like the lotus bud) with a short quote or expansive white space.

sections.style: py-24 md:py-32 px-6 md:px-12 lg:px-24 bg-background_main grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-16 items-center text-text_dark
sections.content: Artham Aesthetique - Skin and Wellness. Focus on natural beauty, restoration. High quality imagery. Learn More/Book CTA.
sections.motion: Fade-in and subtle parallax on the image.

sections.style: py-24 md:py-32 px-6 md:px-12 lg:px-24 bg-background_dark text-text_light grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-16 items-center md:flex-row-reverse
sections.content: Asthi Orthocare - Complete orthopedic Clinic with Joint replacement. Focus on precision, alignment, vitality. Learn More/Book CTA.
sections.motion: Fade-in and subtle parallax on the image.

sections.style: py-20 px-6 md:px-12 bg-primary text-text_light flex flex-col items-center text-center space-y-6
sections.content: Logo, Address: Lotus Plaza, near Mithaas Sweets, Hazipur, Sector 104, Noida, UP 201304. Phone: 098119 97993. No nav links.

global_elements.style: bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:scale-110 transition-transform flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer
global_elements.icon: Whatsapp Icon from lucide-react or react-icons

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-background_main px-8 py-4 rounded-none md:rounded-sm hover:bg-accent_gold transition-colors duration-300 font-secondary tracking-widest text-sm uppercase shadow-sm
buttons.outline: border border-primary text-primary px-8 py-4 rounded-none md:rounded-sm hover:bg-primary hover:text-background_main transition-colors duration-300 font-secondary tracking-widest text-sm uppercase

quotes.style: font-headline text-3xl md:text-5xl italic text-primary border-l-4 border-accent_gold pl-8 py-4 my-8

White Lotus blooming, representing natural beauty and harmony
Skincare serum and natural wellness aesthetic, earthy tones
Eucalyptus branch and serum bottle, calm wellness
Physical therapy hands providing care, black and white / neutral
Physical therapy guided session, restoring alignment

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use any purple, violet, or generic default Tailwind colors. Strictly adhere to the provided warm earthy palette: #844d28, #efdfc8, #483f37, #B8894A.
Do NOT use 'Inter', 'Roboto', or 'Open Sans'. Strictly import and use Tiro Devanagari Hindi, Playfair Display, Poppins, Raleway, and Montserrat.
Include the Devanagari text 'अर्थम्' alongside the English wordmark 'Artham' prominently in the hero section. Both should be elegant and spaced nicely.
Implement scroll-driven animations heavily using framer-motion. The experience should feel unhurried, like walking through an editorial museum.
For CTA buttons, use elegant shapes styled with the Burma Teak (#844d28) color. Maintain sharp or slightly rounded corners (rounded-none or rounded-sm).
Do NOT include a top navigation bar / menu. The user explicitly stated 'No menu required'.
Ensure all interactive elements have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="book-consultation-btn"`).
In the Footer, display the specific given Address and Phone number (Call & WhatsApp) clearly. Do not use placeholder text.
Use a pure .js (React) component structure, avoid .tsx since the environment is standard React/JS.
Make the WhatsApp button floating on the bottom right and persistent.
